queries.question: List all baseball teams and also list basketball teams from the United States.
queries.sql:
SELECT BaseballTeams.teamname
FROM Countries JOIN BaseballTeams ON Countries.id = BaseballTeams.countryId
UNION
SELECT BasketballTeams.teamname
FROM Countries JOIN BasketballTeams ON Countries.id = BasketballTeams.countryId
WHERE Countries.name = "United States"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?countries a :Country .
    ?baseballteams a :BaseballTeams .
    ?baseballteams p:hasCountries ?countries .
    ?baseballteams p:teamName ?teamname .
    BIND(?teamname AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?countries a :Country .
    ?basketballteams a :BasketballTeams .
    ?basketballteams p:hasCountries ?countries .
    ?basketballteams p:teamName ?teamname .
    ?countries p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "United States")
    BIND(?teamname AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: What baseball teams are from the United States, and what basketball teams are also from there?
queries.sql:
SELECT BaseballTeams.teamname
FROM Countries JOIN BaseballTeams ON Countries.id = BaseballTeams.countryId
WHERE Countries.name = "United States"
UNION
SELECT BasketballTeams.teamname
FROM Countries JOIN BasketballTeams ON Countries.id = BasketballTeams.countryId
WHERE Countries.name = "United States"
queries.sparql:

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me baseball teams and basketball teams from the United States.
